'''Ni Khess''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]], probably of the [[warrior caste]]. He wore [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]] and had earned the insignia of significant [[escalation]], and he was almost certainly involved in his people's [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25]]–[[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ni Khess is one of the "Rogue's Gallery" of Yuuzhan Vong featured [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]. His name was supplied in the title of the image [https://web.archive.org/web/*/www.theforce.net/books/carlisle/gallery/illustration/starwars/gamer/NiKhess.jpg NiKhess.jpg] on the old version of [[Jeffery Carlisle]]'s website.
